---
title: "nhdFlowlineLooper_usecase"
output: html_document
---

# Get streamlines
```{r}
#Load shapefile with columns for name, long, and lat in crs = 4326
coords <- read_csv("coordinates.csv")

# Load the function
source("nhdFlowlineLooper.R")

# Use the function
nhdFlowlineLooper(df = coords, distance = 500)
```
